subcodes.title: Words to Ahmad Sohrab, spoken on 1915-04-22
subcodes.first_line: Wait till the end of this war. The new ideals of peace which I have nurtured in my mind will be promoted. God willing we shall take another journey
subcodes.subjects: @means of establishment of future civilization, @present and future expansion of arts and sciences; of technology, @coming-of-age; maturity of mankind, @universal peace; world unity
